item.title: Have some memes! Part Twenty-six
item.description:
The pumpkin spice must flow
Yaaayyy
It me
Saved this because I felt called out
Hell yeah
Accurate
Cuck-tle fish?
I'm sensing a theme
This one is so fucking funny to me
The next few are me specifically
This is the dream!
Hnnngggg
She's gorgeous
Tee-hee!~
Some rad art found on imgur
Mm, a sweet little treat
2 loss memes? It's more likely than you think!

item.title: I Spent a Year Changing My Voice
item.description:
Voice training was the part of transitioning that intimidated me the most. A year later, I've finally found a voice that feels like mine. My new video breaks down everything that actually helped me get there! Including the weird tricks I accidentally taught myself along the way: https://youtu.be/TeKkhGZW0DQ My youtube revenue goes to trans charities.
Advice for my Trans Sisters: Become a Linda Belcher More tricks here: https://youtu.be/TeKkhGZW0DQ
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.dc:creator: J2UDIGI

item.title: Imagine; it's 1943, you're paralysed in an English Hospital and this happens...
item.description:
Dr Ludwig Guttmann, arriving at Stoke Mandeville Hospital, changing the world for the handicapped
Colleagues didn't always agree
Some changes are hard
Always the arguments, always he had an answer. The Film is The Best of Men 2012 My father would spend weekends at Stoke Mandeville in the late 70s in preparation for his work with Prince Charles for 1981 International Year for Disabled Persons. In 1994, my Daughter was born with Down Syndrome - the Hospital asked me if they should put her in a Home. Having worked with Downs kids in '81, no question.
Her Birthday last year.
item.dc:creator: SwissScars

item.title: Jasmne says Hiiiiii!
item.description:
Jasmne gave me her best face while I took her picture. Sweet baby was waiting for breakfast like a good girl.
The Quackstead is actually going well. Our new chickens have started laying eggs but of course, they have been laying them EVERYWHERE. I plan on building more boxes though, finding eggs hidden is like Easter ( except the eggs can burst and smell horrible. )
Precious baby.
Tonight is DnD that I run. I'm excited since we have missed the past few sessions, so everyone is excited to jump back in. It is always fun to share a story with friends.
item.dc:creator: QuackMagicAndHerMagicalBeer

item.title: 22 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 302
item.description: Her mother also moved her from big island to Oahu since the school was better there and has a good performing arts program. She left behind the bulk of her family and sacrificed to chase her daughter’s dream. Also, when asked to be in the live action Moana Auli’i urged Disney to cast another girl because she wanted some other girls dream to come true.

item.title: GovBrief Today #515
item.description: The Supreme Court just gave Donald Trump the power to fire almost any watchdog in Washington who crosses him. For 90 years, the two dozen or so agencies Congress built were meant to be independent of the president. Now they answer to him, and he can fire anyone inside them who won't do what he wants. Justice Sotomayor said the majority gave the president a power no English king ever held. Conservative Justice Neil Gorsuch, who voted to give Trump this power, also warned how it would be used. He pointed at Trump's own FCC, which leaned on ABC over a Jimmy Kimmel monologue. A company out of favor might escape one agency, he wrote, but the same White House now controls them all, and almost no one survives a fight coordinated by a single man with that much power. I've emailed 8,019 stories over 515 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260629-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june29 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-ballots [3] https://go.govbrief.today/def-policy-board [4] https://go.govbrief.today/ar-snap [5] https://go.govbrief.today/gorsuch-fcc [6] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-carroll2 [7] https://go.govbrief.today/agency-firing [8] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-geofence [9] https://go.govbrief.today/work-rules-suit [10] https://go.govbrief.today/sonderling-nominated [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-housing-bill [12] https://go.govbrief.today/gallego-ethics [13] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-eagle [14] https://go.govbrief.today/pa-data-centers [15] https://go.govbrief.today/gateway-funds Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
